evals.prompt: 把 `evals/files/first-ingest-article/` 当成目标 vault 根目录。请把 `raw/inbox/sources/agents-and-memory.md` 这个新来源做第一次 ingest：整理到 `raw/library/sources/`，在 `raw-index.md` 建立条目，创建对应 `wiki/sources/...` 来源页，并更新相关 note 或 synthesis 页面、`index.md` 和 `log.md`。
evals.expected_output: 完成一次新文章的首次 ingest，不仅在真实文件系统中生成 raw/library、raw-index、source page 和相关页面更新，还会在来源页写入结构化提取结果。
expectations: Moves or copies the source into raw/library/sources/ in the target vault
Keeps raw/inbox/sources/ present after moving the source, even if the directory becomes empty
Creates a raw-index entry for the source with a valid status and timestamps
Creates wiki/sources/agents-and-memory.md in the target vault without a typed articles subdirectory
Writes structured source attributes such as tags, summary, key points, entities, questions, or evidence into the source page
Updates at least one related knowledge page or index/log file
Keeps the task scoped to ingest rather than initialization

evals.prompt: 把 `evals/files/reingest-source-changed/` 当成目标 vault 根目录。`raw/library/sources/agents-and-memory.md` 已更新，且 `raw-index.md` 里已经标了 `needs-update` + `source-changed`。请重新 ingest 这个来源，更新来源页、相关 note 或 synthesis 页面、`raw-index.md`、`index.md` 和 `log.md`。
evals.expected_output: 完成一次 source-changed 驱动的重新 ingest，并把状态和来源页内容同步到最新。
expectations: Updates the existing source page to reflect the changed raw content
Updates raw-index.md to reflect successful re-ingest with an updated last_ingested_at
Preserves source identity rather than creating a duplicate source page
Appends a re-ingest style entry to log.md
Updates at least one related page or index entry after re-ingest

evals.prompt: 把 `evals/files/crosspage-sync/` 当成目标 vault 根目录。请 ingest `raw/inbox/sources/agent-memory-webclip.md`，并默认自动同步相关 `wiki/notes/...` 页面，必要时更新 `wiki/syntheses/...`，而不是只停在 source page。
evals.expected_output: 完成一次 webclip ingest，并在真实文件系统里体现跨页同步，同时在来源页保留可复用的结构化属性，而不是只创建来源页。
expectations: Creates a source page for the ingested webclip
Writes extracted questions, concepts, topics, or evidence into the source page rather than only linking outward
Updates an existing wiki/notes page in the target vault
Creates or updates at least one wiki/notes page when the source supports it
Registers the source in raw-index.md and updates log.md
Demonstrates cross-page sync rather than source-page-only ingest

evals.prompt: 把 `evals/files/batch-ingest/` 当成目标 vault 根目录。当前 `raw/inbox/` 里有多个待 ingest 来源，但我这次没有指定单个文件。请批量完成这些候选来源的 ingest：整理到 `raw/library/`、登记 `raw-index.md`、创建对应来源页，并同步相关页面、`index.md` 和 `log.md`。
evals.expected_output: 在未指定单一来源时，批量处理多个待 ingest 候选来源，并为多个来源写入来源页结构化属性，而不是只处理一个。
expectations: Processes more than one source from raw/inbox/ in the target vault
Creates corresponding raw/library entries for multiple sources
Keeps the processed raw/inbox bucket directories present after batch ingest
Registers multiple sources in raw-index.md
Creates more than one source page or otherwise shows multi-source ingest output
Writes structured attributes to source pages for multiple ingested sources, not just file moves and links
Demonstrates batch ingest behavior rather than single-file-only ingest
